info.title: HotelBook API
info.description: Hotel booking system — SWER313 Course Project

tags.name: Reviews
tags.description: Hotel review lifecycle: create, reply, flag, hide, delete

tags.name: Hotel Amenities
tags.description: Manage hotel-level amenities (pool, gym, spa, etc.)

tags.name: Hotels
tags.description: Public hotel browsing and manager hotel management

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Hotel search with filters and autocomplete

tags.name: Customer
tags.description: Customer self-service: bookings, reviews, wishlist, notifications

tags.name: Nearby Places
tags.description: Manage points of interest near the hotel (airports, beaches, malls, etc.)

tags.name: Location
tags.description: Hotel location management and proximity search

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Mock payment processing, refunds, and payment retrieval

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Booking lifecycle: create, confirm, cancel, complete

tags.name: Hotel Policies
tags.description: Check-in, pet, and breakfast policy management

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin-only hotel and user management endpoints

tags.name: Hotel Photos
tags.description: Manage hotel gallery photos. GET endpoints are public. POST/DELETE/PATCH require HOTEL_MANAGER role.

get.description: Returns the check-in policy for the hotel. Public endpoint.

404.description: No check-in policy found for this hotel

put.description: Updates the existing check-in policy. All fields are replaced (full update). Returns 404 if no policy exists — use POST to create first.

404.description: No check-in policy found — use POST to create first

post.description: Creates the check-in policy for the hotel. Returns 409 if one already exists — use PUT to update.

409.description: Check-in policy already exists — use PUT

post.description: Customer submits a review for a completed booking.

409.description: Review already exists for this booking

post.description: Triggers a notification to a recipient. Normally M2 calls NotificationService directly; this endpoint is for manual sends, retries, or testing.

200.description: Notification sent (or attempted) — check status in response

get.description: Returns paginated ACTIVE hotels. Supports keyword, city, countryCode, type, and starRating filters. No authentication required.

post.description: Manager creates a new hotel. It starts as PENDING and becomes visible only after admin approval.

get.description: Returns the pet policy for the hotel. Public endpoint.

404.description: No pet policy found for this hotel

post.description: Creates or updates the pet policy. If a policy already exists it will be updated — no 409 Conflict. If petsAllowed=false, petFee is automatically cleared.

get.description: Returns the breakfast policy for the hotel. Public endpoint.

404.description: No breakfast policy found for this hotel

post.description: Creates or updates the breakfast policy. Business rules: (1) if breakfastOffered=false, type and price fields are cleared; (2) if includedInPrice=true, pricePerPerson is cleared.

get.description: Returns all photos for a hotel sorted by display_order ascending. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

post.description: Adds a new photo to the hotel gallery. Set isCover=true to make this photo the thumbnail shown in listings. Any existing cover is automatically cleared.

403.description: Not a manager or you don't own this hotel

get.description: Returns all nearby places sorted by distance (closest first). Optionally filter by type. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional type filter: AIRPORT, BEACH, MALL, RESTAURANT, LANDMARK, HOSPITAL

post.description: Adds a new point of interest near the hotel. Only the hotel's manager can add entries.

403.description: Not a hotel manager or not the owner of this hotel

get.description: Returns the full address, coordinates, and Google Maps Place ID for a hotel. Public endpoint — no token required.

post.description: Sets the address and coordinates for a hotel. Each hotel can have only one location. Accessible by the hotel's manager or an admin.

409.description: Location already exists for this hotel

delete.description: Removes the location record for a hotel. Admin only. Normally location deletion is handled by hotel deletion via cascade.

patch.description: Partially updates the hotel's location. Only the fields included in the request body are changed (PATCH semantics).

get.description: Returns all amenities for a hotel. Optionally filter by category. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Optional category filter: WELLNESS, DINING, TRANSPORT, CONNECTIVITY, PARKING, FAMILY, BUSINESS

post.summary: Add an amenity to a hotel
post.description: Adds a new amenity. Only the hotel's manager can add amenities. Duplicate names (case-insensitive) within the same hotel are rejected.

403.description: Not a hotel manager or not the owner of this hotel

get.description: Returns all accessibility features for a hotel. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

post.description: Adds a new accessibility feature to the hotel. Requires HOTEL_MANAGER role and ownership of the hotel.

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: UUID of the hotel to save

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: UUID of the hotel to unsave

get.description: Returns all bookings for the authenticated customer.

post.description: Customer creates a booking. Status starts as PENDING. Proceed to POST /api/payments/bookings/{bookingId} to pay and confirm.

409.description: Room not available for selected dates

get.description: Returns the payment record for the authenticated customer's booking.

404.description: Payment not found for this booking

post.description: Simulates payment for a PENDING booking. On success the booking is automatically confirmed and dates are blocked. Set simulateFailure=true in the body to test the failure path.

200.description: Payment processed (check status field: PAID or FAILED)

409.description: Booking is not PENDING, or payment already exists

post.description: Cancels the booking and calculates a refund based on the cancellation policy. Full refund if no policy configured.
Creates a Customer or Hotel Manager account and returns a JWT token
Stateless logout — client should discard the token
Authenticates user credentials and returns a JWT token

patch.summary: Manager adds a reply to a review

get.description: Returns full hotel details. Only ACTIVE hotels are visible publicly. No authentication required.

404.description: Hotel not found or not active

delete.description: Manager soft-deletes their hotel — sets status to SUSPENDED. Reversible. Use the admin endpoint for permanent deletion.

403.description: Not the owner of this hotel

patch.description: Manager updates their own hotel. Partial update — only send fields you want to change. Updating a REJECTED hotel resets it to PENDING.

403.description: Not the owner of this hotel

patch.description: Reassigns the display order for all hotel photos. The request body must include ALL photo UUIDs for the hotel in the desired order. The index of each UUID in the array becomes that photo's display_order value.

200.description: Photos reordered successfully — returns updated list

400.description: Validation failed — photoIds must include all existing photos for this hotel

403.description: Not a manager or you don't own this hotel

404.description: Hotel not found or a photo UUID is invalid

patch.summary: Update notes on a saved hotel

patch.description: Admin or hotel manager marks a CONFIRMED booking as NO_SHOW when guest doesn't arrive.

Moves a PENDING booking to CONFIRMED. Blocks room availability for the dates. Normally triggered automatically after successful payment, but this endpoint allows manual confirmation by admins/managers.

409.description: Booking is not in PENDING status

patch.description: Admin or hotel manager marks a CONFIRMED booking as COMPLETED after guest check-out.
Customer cancels their own PENDING or CONFIRMED booking. If CONFIRMED, room availability is unblocked. Use POST /api/payments/bookings/{bookingId}/refund to get a refund.

409.description: Booking cannot be cancelled in its current status

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's name, phone, nationality, or date of birth
Changes the authenticated user's password after verifying the current one

400.description: Validation failed or passwords don't match

401.description: Not authenticated or wrong current password

patch.description: Restores a previously suspended user. Sets isActive=true — the user can log in again immediately.
Sets isActive=false. The user is immediately locked out. Existing JWT tokens are invalidated on next request.

400.description: Reason is blank, or tried to suspend an admin

patch.description: Changes hotel status to REJECTED. Requires a reason that will be communicated to the hotel manager.

400.description: Reason is blank or too short

patch.description: Changes hotel status from PENDING to ACTIVE. The hotel becomes visible in public listings immediately.

delete.description: Admin or the owning customer can delete a review.

get.summary: Get reviews for a specific hotel
Get average scores for a hotel
Get reviews by a specific customer

get.description: Returns any payment by UUID. Available to admins and the owning customer.
Returns a single notification including the full email body. Accessible by the recipient or any admin.
Search active hotels by city, dates, and optional filters. Returns only hotels with available rooms for the dates. Filters for room type, bed type, amenities, and policies are all optional.
Returns all active hotels within the specified radius (km) of the given coordinates, sorted by distance ascending. Uses a bounding-box pre-filter + Haversine formula for accuracy.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude of the search center (-90 to 90)

parameters.name: lng
parameters.description: Longitude of the search center (-180 to 180)

get.description: Returns all hotels owned by the authenticated manager, across all statuses (PENDING, ACTIVE, REJECTED, SUSPENDED).
Returns up to 10 hotel names matching the query. Minimum 2 characters.

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: UUID of the hotel to check

get.description: Step 1 stub — returns empty list.
Step 1 stub — returns empty list.
Returns a specific booking owned by the authenticated customer.

404.description: Booking not found or doesn't belong to this customer

get.summary: Get all bookings for a hotel
get.description: Admin or hotel manager views all bookings for a specific hotel, sorted by check-in date.
Returns a paginated list of all users regardless of role or active status.
Returns hotel counts by status, user counts by role, and booking/revenue totals (stubs for Step 1).
Returns a paginated list of hotels. Optionally filter by status (PENDING, ACTIVE, REJECTED, SUSPENDED). Admins see all statuses, unlike the public endpoint which only shows ACTIVE.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by hotel status. Omit to get all hotels.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a photo. The photo must belong to the specified hotel. If the deleted photo was the cover, no photo will be marked as cover until the manager sets a new one.

403.description: Not a manager or you don't own this hotel

delete.description: Removes a nearby place entry. The owning hotel manager or an admin can delete.

403.description: Not the owner of this hotel

404.description: Hotel or nearby place not found

delete.description: Removes an amenity from a hotel. The hotel manager who owns the hotel, or an admin, can delete amenities.

403.description: Not the owner of this hotel

delete.description: Deletes an accessibility feature from the hotel. Requires HOTEL_MANAGER role. Service verifies the feature belongs to this hotel.

404.description: Feature not found or doesn't belong to this hotel

delete.description: Permanently deletes a hotel and all its child records. Irreversible. Use reject or suspend for reversible actions.
